items.title: This is the craziest coincidence in NBA history...
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
This is the craziest coincidence in NBA history...

11 years and 13 days ago, Steph Curry had the exact same statline as Wemby did, in the exact same scenario:
down 2-1 vs the Grizzlies, and went on to win the title.

(via KlawWrld)
#NBA

items.title: Would Grizzlies have done JJJ trade if they knew they couldn't get top-5 pick with it? I don't know. Grizzlies seem to be only team impacted by the restrictions.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
Would Grizzlies have done JJJ trade if they knew they couldn't get top-5 pick with it? I don't know. Grizzlies seem to be only team impacted by the restrictions.

Rules also won’t prevent a team from picking No. 1 pick in two straight seasons with different team picks www.nytimes.com/athletic/730...

items.title: The OKC Thunder only scored 82 points in the Loss against the Spurs. This is their worst scoring NBA game since Dec 2, 2021 where they lost 79-152 against the Grizzlies and set the all time 73-point score margin.
items.author: Spekirlation
items.body_excerpt: The Thunder played some of their worst basketball in years today. They only had 68 points at 6 minutes left in the 4th. While scrolling back through their records, they have not dropped below 100 points in a game this year (excluding pre-season). Moreover, the last time they…

items.title: Sources: The Milwaukee Bucks will add Patrick St. Andrews as an assistant coach, reuniting him with coach Taylor Jenkins. He was an assistant coach for the Blazers. Prior, he was an assistant coach with Jenkins on the Grizzlies and with Mike Budenholzer on the Bucks and Hawks.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Milwaukee Bucks will add Patrick St. Andrews as an assistant coach, reuniting him with coach Taylor Jenkins. He was an assistant coach for the Blazers. Prior, he was an assistant coach with Jenkins on the Grizzlies and with Mike Budenholzer on the Bucks and Hawks.
